texto: My Dad once told me: “you will retire only in your grave!”
autor: I wish he is alive to ask him ”when I will retire searching for my grave!
explicacao: Citação de I wish he is alive to ask him ”when I will retire searching for my grave! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “My Dad once told me: “you will retire only in your grave!”” articula reflexao, hisham-fawzi, retire em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
